creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

by default devel/dbus create machine id file here:
- /var/lib/dbus/machine-id

Seems that some applications expect it also in this place:
- /var/local/lib/dbus/machine-id

Details:
- https://vermaden.wordpress.com/2023/08/19/quick-dbus-fix/

Regards,
vermaden
